headline: Four Rules for Dressing Like a Boss, According to Powerful Women
summary: To the CEO and co-founder of organic baby formula company Bobbie, finding clothes is another chore on an already long to-do list.  “It feels like a uniform, I don’t even need to think about it,” says Modi, who often shops at Argent, Scanlan Theodore and Ralph Lauren.  For women in the C-suite, dressing like a boss can sometimes feel as daunting as actually being a boss.

headline: Citigroup Upgrades Ralph Lauren Corporation (RL), Highlights Brand Positioning Efforts and Resilient Consumers
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 10 Large-Cap Stocks with Insider Buying in 2026. Ralph Lauren Corporation is among the best stocks with insider buying. TheFly reported on March 24 that Citigroup upgraded RL from Neutral to Buy and set a new price target of $400, up from $360. The firm anticipates a stronger […]
